cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which book Dave ends up with after all these trades. Let me start by keeping track of each step. First, at the beginning of the semester, each person has their own book: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, the trades happen in a sequence. Let's go step by step. 1. **Claire and Bob swap books.** So after this swap, Claire will have Ulysses and Bob will have The Fellowship of the Ring. Let me note that down: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 2. **Claire and Dave swap books.** So now Claire gives Ulysses to Dave, and Dave gives Lolita to Claire. Updating the list: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob:
